title: linaria × oligotricha
intro: Linaria × oligotricha, also known as toadflax, is a hybrid flowering plant belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Linaria × oligotricha include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
